case_title: GILLIAM, MIRA VS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-10-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-24-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GILLIAM, MIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $772.00, THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT IN MAINTAINING ITS PROPERTY. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT IN REMEDIATING THE WATER FROM PLAINTIFF'S PREMISES AFTER IT HAD NOTICE OF THE BROKEN PIPE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY GILLIAM, MIRA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
